name: Paris
description: The city of lights known for the Eiffel Tower, art museums, and romantic atmosphere.

name: Tokyo
description: A vibrant mix of traditional temples and futuristic skyscrapers.

name: Bali
description: A tropical paradise known for beaches, temples, and lush rice terraces.

name: New York
description: The city that never sleeps, famous for Times Square and Central Park.

name: Rome
description: The eternal city filled with ancient ruins, art, and amazing cuisine.

name: Santorini
description: A beautiful island known for white houses, blue domes, and sunsets.

name: Dubai
description: A modern desert city famous for luxury shopping and the Burj Khalifa.

name: Sydney
description: Known for the iconic Opera House and beautiful harbor views.

name: Cape Town
description: A stunning coastal city with Table Mountain and beautiful beaches.

name: Barcelona
description: A vibrant city famous for Gaudí architecture and Mediterranean culture.
